UNAUTHENTICATED: Authentication required. Please log in to continue.
FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to perform this action.
NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
CONFLICT: A record with this information already exists.
UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY: The provided data could not be processed.
TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests. Please slow down and try again later.
INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
email_in_use: This email address is already registered.
email_not_verified: Please verify your email address before logging in.
invalid_token: The token provided is invalid or has expired.
session_not_found: Session not found or has already been revoked.
permissions_not_found: The following permissions were not found: {permissions}.
database_conflict: A record with this value already exists.
related_record_not_found: A related record referenced in your request was not found.
password_same_as_current: New password must be different from the current password.
current_password_incorrect: The current password you entered is incorrect.
session_expired: Session expired or has been revoked.
account_locked: Account temporarily locked due to too many failed login attempts. Please try again in {minutes} minutes.
already_subscribed: You have already been subscribed to our newsletter
already_unsubscribed: You have already unsubscribed to our newsletter
